AC-SMOKE-1.requirement: VER can register a passing AC in execute mode and persist it to the verification registry for later regression checks

verification.command: invoke harness_verify_register and harness_verify_list in execute mode
verification.description: Regression re-check of verification-registry plumbing after INC-3: update the existing AC entry via harness_verify_register, then confirm harness_verify_list still returns cumulative entries in execute mode after subagent renderer changes in extensions/index.ts.
